error_signature: undefined or other errors based on trying js code on undefined values
title: Undefined values in Edit Fields (set) node
symptom: In the Edit Fields node, multiple fields show 'undefined' instead of their expected values, causing the workflow to fail without any output.
root_cause: The issue arises when variables are defined with both single and double quotes, leading to conflicts in how the values are interpreted. This can cause the node to fail to recognize the intended values, resulting in 'undefined' outputs.
fix_steps: Open the Edit Fields (set) node settings
Check the variable definitions for quotes
Remove either single or double quotes to ensure consistency
agent_instruction: Ensure variable definitions in the Edit Fields node use consistent quoting and save the workflow.
